compressed_prompt: 4 bullet points on Star Wars' popularity, no commas
response:
• Star Wars captivated global audiences with its groundbreaking special effects and epic storytelling that felt entirely new to moviegoers in 1977

• The franchise expanded into books and video games and toys creating a massive cultural universe that kept fans engaged for decades

• Beloved characters like Luke Skywalker and Darth Vader became iconic symbols recognized by people of all ages across countless countries

• Disney's acquisition of Lucasfilm brought new films and TV shows that introduced Star Wars to an entirely fresh generation of devoted fans
